note: Hardcoded authoritative answers for special-bet superlatives. When a field appears here it is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH and overrides the API/computed leader. Fields NOT listed keep the current behavior (computed from the feed, or 'לא זמין' if no data). Ties: list every leader; all pickers of any listed entry are scored. Team fields use FIFA codes (see teams.json); a leader's `value` is the metric (goals/cards) shown in the UI.
